The [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession] enters this state after you call [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/disconnect()] or because the connection has been interrupted.

# FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.disconnected(_:)

**Case**

The session has disconnected or failed to connect to a streaming endpoint.

## Declaration

```swift
case disconnected(FoveatedStreamingSession.DisconnectReason)
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession] enters this state after you call [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/disconnect()] or because the connection has been interrupted.
title: FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.disconnected(_:)
